sentences.arabic_text: فَنَادَىٰ فِي الظُّلُمَاتِ أَن لَّا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
sentences.english: He called out in the darkness: There is no god but You, glory to You — I was among the wrongdoers

sentences.arabic_text: وَإِلَٰهُكُمْ إِلَٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ ۖ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ الرَّحِيمُ
sentences.english: And your God is one God — there is no god but He, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate

sentences.arabic_text: وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ لِأَبِيهِ آزَرَ أَتَتَّخِذُ أَصْنَامًا آلِهَةً
sentences.english: And when Ibrahim said to his father Azar: Do you take idols as gods?

sentences.arabic_text: يَا قَوْمِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَيْرُهُ
sentences.english: O my people, worship Allah — you have no god other than Him

sentences.arabic_text: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ · مَلِكِ النَّاسِ · إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ
sentences.english: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the King of mankind, the God of mankind

sentences.arabic_text: كَبُرَ مَقْتًا عِندَ اللَّهِ أَن تَقُولُوا مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
sentences.english: Greatly hateful in the sight of Allah that you say what you do not do

sentences.arabic_text: فَأَرَاهُ الْآيَةَ الْكُبْرَىٰ
sentences.english: And he showed him the greatest sign

sentences.arabic_text: وَلَذِكْرُ اللَّهِ أَكْبَرُ
sentences.english: And the remembrance of Allah is greater

sentences.arabic_text: قَالَ بَلْ فَعَلَهُ كَبِيرُهُمْ هَٰذَا فَاسْأَلُوهُمْ إِن كَانُوا يَنطِقُونَ
sentences.english: He said: Rather, this — the biggest of them — did it. So ask them, if they can speak

sentences.arabic_text: إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ وَاسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ
sentences.english: Except Iblis — he refused and was arrogant and became of the disbelievers

sentences.arabic_text: فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاسْتَغْفِرْ لِذَنبِكَ
sentences.english: So know that there is no god but Allah, and seek forgiveness for your sins

sentences.arabic_text: قُلْ إِنَّمَا أَنَا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُوحَىٰ إِلَيَّ أَنَّمَا إِلَٰهُكُمْ إِلَٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ
sentences.english: Say: I am only a man like you. It is revealed to me that your God is one God

sentences.arabic_text: قَالُوا يَا مُوسَى اجْعَل لَّنَا إِلَٰهًا كَمَا لَهُمْ آلِهَةٌ
sentences.english: They said: O Musa, make for us a god just as they have gods

sentences.arabic_text: وَقَالَ فِرْعَوْنُ مَا عَلِمْتُ لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَيْرِي
sentences.english: And Pharaoh said: I do not know of any god for you other than myself

sentences.arabic_text: قُلِ اللَّهُمَّ مَالِكَ الْمُلْكِ تُؤْتِي الْمُلْكَ مَن تَشَاءُ
sentences.english: Say: O Allah, Owner of all sovereignty, You give sovereignty to whom You will

sentences.arabic_text: كَبُرَتْ كَلِمَةً تَخْرُجُ مِنْ أَفْوَاهِهِمْ ۚ إِن يَقُولُونَ إِلَّا كَذِبًا
sentences.english: Grave is the word that comes out of their mouths — they speak nothing but a lie

sentences.arabic_text: الَّذِي يَصْلَى النَّارَ الْكُبْرَىٰ
sentences.english: The one who will burn in the greatest Fire

sentences.arabic_text: فَلَمَّا رَأَى الشَّمْسَ بَازِغَةً قَالَ هَٰذَا رَبِّي هَٰذَا أَكْبَرُ
sentences.english: When he saw the sun rising, he said: This is my Lord — this is greater

sentences.arabic_text: يَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الْخَمْرِ وَالْمَيْسِرِ ۖ قُلْ فِيهِمَا إِثْمٌ كَبِيرٌ
sentences.english: They ask you about wine and gambling. Say: In them is great sin

sentences.arabic_text: فَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَاسْتَكْبَرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ الْحَقِّ وَقَالُوا مَنْ أَشَدُّ مِنَّا قُوَّةً
sentences.english: As for Aad, they were arrogant in the land without right and said: Who is mightier than us in strength?

sentences.arabic_text: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاللهُ أَكْبَرُ
sentences.english: Glory be to Allah, praise be to Allah, there is no god but Allah, and Allah is the Greatest
